title: useMutationObserver
description: Observes changes to the DOM, such as attributes, children, or text content.
summary: Watches for DOM mutations in real-time.

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"use-mutation-observer",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
\r
export function useMutationObserver<T extends HTMLElement = any>(callback: MutationCallback, options: MutationObserverInit, target?: HTMLElement | (() => HTMLElement) | null) {\r
  const observer = React.useRef<MutationObserver | null>(null);\r
  const ref = React.useRef<T>(null);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    const targetElement = typeof target === "function" ? target() : target;\r
\r
    if (targetElement || ref.current) {\r
      observer.current = new MutationObserver(callback);\r
      observer.current.observe(targetElement || ref.current!, options);\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      observer.current?.disconnect();\r
    };\r
  }, [callback, options]);\r
\r
  return ref;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-mutation-observer.ts"})]})}function d(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,r.jsx)(u,{...t})}):u(t)}function w(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return k(y);})();
